plugins.name: pmos-toolkit
plugins.description: Product management and software delivery pipeline — requirements, spec, plan, execute, verify, and supporting utilities.

plugins.name: pmos-learnkit
plugins.description: Learning kit — verified-source, audience-shaped teachable artifacts (primers and ramp-up docs) generated on demand.

plugins.name: pmos-utilities
plugins.description: Environment utilities — keep your machine and working setup healthy. Standalone diagnostics and cleanup (e.g. Mac health) that aren't part of the delivery pipeline or the learning kit.

plugins.name: pmos-gamekit
plugins.description: Game kit — casual single-player browser games, pre-bundled as self-contained HTML and launched from a skill via a zero-dependency local server.
